title: 4x Halloween Foam Tombstone Realistic RIP Headstone Grave Yard Gravestones Props Graveyard Scene Setter
features: Each gravestone is 43cm tall and made from durable polystyrene material, ensuring they can withstand outdoor use. The black colour and skull character family make them a great addition to any graveyard-themed party. The Decsee brand has designed these tombstones with a Skeletons and Graveyard character theme, making them a unique and exciting addition to your Halloween decoration collection. Use them to create a garden display that will impress your guests and add to the overall ambiance of your party. Get your hands on these tombstones and make your Halloween decorations come to life
Each Tombstone is 43cm in height. Halloween RIP Graveyard Tombstones Party Haunted House Decor Yard Lawn Sign
Stakes are include with each gravestone. Light foam material that looks realistic. Give your yard a deadly appearance with these lightweight and easy to move foam tombstones
description: Product Description Easy to Dimensions Each tombstone measures approximately 18cm wide and 43cm tall. Each tombstone is made of foam and lightweight, making it easy to more and position where you like! Unique designs Foam Graveyard Headstones and 8 plastic Stakes for securing the gravestones into the ground for outdoor use. Or simply place up against the windows indoors! Spooky Scene setters 4 different spooky and unique designs for horror ambiance, with realistic stone or wood finish to complete the grim look. Perfect for any scary situation from yard decorations, Halloween parties, carnivals, mazes, and much more. Easy to set up Simply use the plastic stake provided and push into the tombstone and then into the ground, giving your garden a deadly appearance with these lightweight and easy to move foam tombstones
